results.rendered_html: bhūyaśas (von bhūyaṃm) adv. meist, in der Regel: te tasya bhūyaśo (bhūyaso  ed. Bomb. ) doṣānvardhayanti  MBH. 3,1948 . amitrānbhūyaśo (bhūyaso  ed. B. ) paśyet 5,1214 . 10,86 . wieder, von Neuem: so 'tha bhūyaśastāvupasthitaḥ (saṃśayaṃ samupa˚ die neuere Ausg.)  HARIV. 11503 . nottiṣṭheransma bhūyaśaḥ  BHĀG. P. 8,5,15 .
